name: Popcorn Munchy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 250°F (120°C).
2. Melt margarine in a 13x9-inch pan in the oven.
3. Remove from the oven and stir in seasoned salt, garlic powder, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. In a large bowl, combine popcorn, wheat squares cereal, crackers, sesame sticks, and peanuts.
5. Pour the melted margarine over the dry ingredients and toss lightly until all pieces are coated.
6. Divide evenly between two 13x9-inch pans.
7. Bake for 1 hour, stirring every 15 minutes.
8. Allow to cool completely before serving.
9. Store in airtight containers. Makes 12 cups.
